query: UPDATE portfolioTransactions pt JOIN stocks s ON pt.ticker = s.ticker SET pt.currency = s.currency WHERE pt.ticker IS NOT NULL
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute UPDATE portfolioTransactions pt JOIN stocks s ON pt.ticker = s.ticker SET pt.currency = s.currency WHERE pt.ticker IS NOT NULL
